briefs.title: BC Utilities Commission directed to approve North Coast Transmission Line costs in electricity rates
briefs.summary: BC's government has ordered its electricity regulator to add new rate charges and allow BC Hydro to recover all costs of the North Coast Transmission Line project — a major new power line from Prince George to Bob Quinn Lake — directly from electricity customers.
briefs.action_required: Review your BC Hydro electricity bills for new rate supplements that may increase your energy costs.

key_dates.label: BC North Coast Transmission Line rate supplements take effect — BC Hydro Electric Tariff

briefs.industries: Natural Resources, Construction & Development, Transportation & Logistics
